context: Tests whether the agent implements product attribute extraction using the correct model, API settings, prompt schema, and response processing as specified in the product content enrichment skill.

checklist.name: Correct extraction model
checklist.description: Uses 'gpt-4o-mini' (not gpt-4o, gpt-4, gpt-3.5-turbo, or other models) for attribute extraction

checklist.name: json_object response format
checklist.description: The API call for attribute extraction sets response_format to { type: 'json_object' }

checklist.name: Temperature zero
checklist.description: Temperature is set to 0 for the attribute extraction API call

checklist.name: Required attribute keys
checklist.description: The extraction prompt asks for all seven specific keys: material, color, dimensions, weight, care_instructions, country_of_origin, and warranty

checklist.name: Null for missing values
checklist.description: The prompt explicitly instructs the model to use null (not an empty string, 'unknown', or omit the key) for any attribute not mentioned in the description

checklist.name: No inference instruction
checklist.description: The prompt explicitly states NOT to guess or infer values not explicitly stated in the description

checklist.name: Null value stripping
checklist.description: After parsing the JSON response, null (and undefined) values are filtered out before the attributes object is returned or saved

checklist.name: JSON parse try/catch
checklist.description: JSON.parse (or equivalent) of the model's response is wrapped in a try/catch block that throws or returns a meaningful error on parse failure

checklist.name: Batch continues on failure
checklist.description: When processing multiple descriptions, a failure for one product is caught per-product and the batch continues rather than throwing and stopping all processing

checklist.name: Extracted results in output file
checklist.description: A results file (JSON) is written containing the extracted attributes for each processed product, with null-stripped fields
